site.name: Camille Devaney
site.title: Camille Devaney | Builder & Creative
site.description: Camille Devaney is a Miami-based builder and creative working across growth and marketing, institutional sales and trading, and AI-driven systems. She grows audiences and communities with curated AI and builds the data and CRM behind them.

hero.imageAlt: Camille Devaney smiling with her eyes closed and wind in her hair, on a boat at sea during golden hour, the deep blue ocean and a clear sky behind her.

intro: I grow audiences and communities with curated AI systems. A marketer's instinct for what resonates, an entrepreneurial habit of shipping. From an institutional trading desk to leading my firm's AI modernization and CRM rebuild.
